{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221914390F8C6FEA9440264F1327"}"},"total":515},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7399697187173171992","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级好看的一本书，是找了这么多田径文以来最好看的一本，作者写数据什么的都很认真，然后主线也特别快不会很拖沓。像别的文这么多章应该才写到刚开始"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1722881178,"group_id":"7262038656884411444","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5ZPYrAWwYRGEuNQC3nx2NWrRP2Qwa5Bx9+GwXA/snmd","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0c1fad166b2b45ab8da2af867ca4af47~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706955&x-signature=SxXQn%2FhiGzwgiDnUkZEWYSqQH3I%3D","user_id":"3518032699205167","user_name":"回憶总是如鲠在喉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3518032699205167","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1733560054,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7262038656884411444","book_info":{"abstract":"（体育+男子短跑+单女主+奥运会+架空）
我叫赵风，那一年我遇到了我的教练，也遇到了一个让我想要变得更好的人。
他们告诉我，我应该跑得更快，去站在世界之巅，看着国旗飘扬，让世界听到我们华夏国歌的声音。
去跑，去练，用自己的实力证明，黄种人也能跑！
我，追着风而来，在田径赛场的历史上，留下了一个又一个属于华夏人的记录。
100米，4×100接力，200米，400米！
这个时代，不是博尔特的时代，不是加特林，不是范尼凯克的时代。
它，是我的时代！
我是赵风，我是华夏飞人！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o6c177da42649d8c3c95e35eebb6e806b~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"花花不是果赖","author_id":"","book_id":"7262038656884411444","book_name":"奥运：我，华夏飞人，短跑之神","book_short_name":"我，短跑之王","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#300810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9671人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7262038717483713024","read_count":"9671","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1303673"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"568","tags":"游戏体育,体育,单女主,1v1,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7774fa3583aa4b30c05ad6e466893d22~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779362080&x-signature=BAZfl17j4wckOaKO9P0p0C05gyM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"84889256614","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"278"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221914390F8C6FEA9440264F1327"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":33674,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2693},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1722917451,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7376904068576150334","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看爱看[爱慕]，虽然不是系统文，但比系统文真实多了，再多一些日常风可能会更吸引读者（个人建议，大大可以想想），没有成功是一蹴而就的[哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1717573453,"group_id":"7262038656884411444","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日逆天新作小登，主打一个叛逆","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxMUeckItyHkhjg35pERueIJJ2mdG2KkObzXcCCixivA","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cfda934eb3d145fe972648b916ab49c0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708748&x-signature=wBjfjvXIEsRwEmNdcog4FvopFcQ%3D","user_id":"2242659423101543","user_name":"书痴墨客"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2242659423101543","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1649809447,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7262038656884411444","book_info":{"abstract":"（体育+男子短跑+单女主+奥运会+架空）

:{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1717597850,"author_reply_time":1717597907,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7319534996853703451","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"与大多数体育小说的男主依靠系统飞速成长不大一样，这篇小说主要以男主的努力和过人的天赋以及少许爱情的刺激才得以成功。如果书荒的时候可以多看看，这本书的沉浸式较强，可以使你把自己带进去。中间爆发虽有点老套但仍然有理有据。当然每本书都有自己的毒点个人不做评价。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1704212627,"group_id":"7262038656884411444","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+EWNPSH8HwMgRPmj0xtzySqdlW1D6pHyzQLQ7KWdbGZ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702450&x-signature=Ei72J6rSbnhecWr1N7y3lf3qNeE%3D","user_id":"3087052264192526","user_name":"喜欢管钟的薛明烨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3087052264192526","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7262038656884411444","book_info":{"abstract":"（体育+男子短跑+单女主+奥运会+架空）
